tasks.subject: P2 Task 1: User.emailNotifications preference (schema + migration)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a per-user email on/off flag defaulting to ON, backfilling existing users.

**Files:** prisma/schema.prisma (User), prisma/migrations/<ts>_user_email_notifications/migration.sql, tests/unit/schema.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** emailNotifications Boolean @default(true); migration backfills true; prisma generate succeeds.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/schema.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["prisma/schema.prisma", "tests/unit/schema.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/schema.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["User.emailNotifications Boolean default true", "migration backfills existing rows", "prisma generate succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 2: Email transport (lib/email.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Env-gated nodemailer transport that no-ops when unconfigured; JSON capture transport for tests.

**Files:** lib/email.ts, package.json (+nodemailer,@types/nodemailer), .env.example, tests/unit/email.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** isEmailConfigured gated on env; sendMail no-ops unconfigured; json transport captures.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/email.ts", "package.json", ".env.example", "tests/unit/email.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["isEmailConfigured env-gated", "sendMail no-ops unconfigured", "json transport captures"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 3: Email templates (lib/email-templates.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure renderActivityEmail -> {subject, html, text} with absolute deep link.

**Files:** lib/email-templates.ts, tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** absolute BETTER_AUTH_URL link in html+text; singular/plural count phrasing; multi-actor collapse.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/email-templates.ts", "tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email-templates.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["absolute deep link", "count phrasing", "multi-actor collapse"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 4: Email digest buffer (lib/email-digest.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Coalesce a burst of events for one (user,doc) into one email after a debounce; no-op when unconfigured.

**Files:** lib/email-digest.ts, tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** burst -> one sendMail; separate keys -> separate sends; no-op when unconfigured.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/email-digest.ts", "tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/email-digest.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["burst coalesces", "separate keys separate sends", "no-op unconfigured"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 5: Wire email into notifyParticipants
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Enqueue email for opted-in non-actor recipients on comment/review/version; resolve stays in-app only; in-app unchanged.

**Files:** lib/notifications.ts, tests/unit/notifications.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** opted-out excluded; actor excluded; resolve no email; in-app createMany unchanged.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/notifications.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/notifications.ts", "tests/unit/notifications.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit tests/unit/notifications.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["opted-out excluded", "actor excluded", "resolve no email", "in-app unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: P2 Task 6: Notification settings UI + settings sub-nav
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Settings page with email on/off toggle, PATCH API, and settings sub-nav reaching Tokens + Notifications.

**Files:** app/app/settings/layout.tsx, app/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx, components/NotificationSettings.tsx, app/api/settings/notifications/route.ts, components/AppNav.tsx, tests/e2e/notifications-pref.spec.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** page shows current pref; toggle persists via PATCH; sub-nav reaches both; API 401 unauthenticated.

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/notifications-pref.spec.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/app/settings/layout.tsx", "app/app/settings/notifications/page.tsx", "components/NotificationSettings.tsx", "app/api/settings/notifications/route.ts", "components/AppNav.tsx", "tests/e2e/notifications-pref.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:e2e tests/e2e/notifications-pref.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shows current pref", "toggle persists", "sub-nav reaches both", "API 401 unauthenticated"]}
```
